name: Medusa
description: Open-source headless commerce engine providing storefront APIs for products, carts, orders, and customers. Build custom e-commerce experiences with flexible product catalogs, checkout flows, and order management.

capabilities.name: list_products
capabilities.description: Browse and search the product catalog with filtering by collection, category, tags, and pricing. Returns product details including variants and images.

capabilities.name: get_product
capabilities.description: Retrieve full details for a specific product including all variants, options, images, and metadata.

capabilities.name: create_cart
capabilities.description: Create a new shopping cart for a customer session, optionally pre-populated with line items and a region.

capabilities.name: update_cart
capabilities.description: Add or remove line items from a cart, apply discount codes, set shipping address, and select shipping options.

capabilities.name: complete_checkout
capabilities.description: Finalize a cart into an order by completing payment and creating the order record for fulfillment.

capabilities.name: list_collections
capabilities.description: Retrieve product collections available in the store for organized browsing and category-based navigation.

capabilities.name: get_order
capabilities.description: Look up an existing order by ID to check its status, line items, payment details, and fulfillment progress.

capabilities.name: list_regions
capabilities.description: Retrieve available regions with their currencies, tax rates, and supported payment and fulfillment providers.
